impacts.statement: River reaches gage house along Highway 49.
Water is near the road surface on the Highway 49 bridge over the Big Black River.
Water is approaching the underclearance of the Highway 49 bridge.
The river is at the flood of record.
Agricultural land along the river is devastated by flood waters.
Devastating flooding of agricultural land begins to occur.
Flooding of agricultural land has more than doubled in the last 1.5 feet rise.
Extensive flooding of agricultural land is occurring.
Agricultural land near the river begins to flood.
Low lying woodland areas along the river begins to flood.
Minor low land flooding occurs along the river.

properties.caption: Downstream view from Highway 49 bridge - stage 10.98 Feet
Upstream view from the Highway 49 Bridge - Stage 10.93 feet

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
